name: Philip Brunelle
abstract: Philip Brunelle (born July 1, 1943) is an American choral scholar, conductor and organist. He is the founder of VocalEssence.

concerts.label: Monroe Crossing with the Masterwork Festival Chorus and New York Wind Symphony
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: The World Beloved: A Bluegrass Mass

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: It’s recorded by Philip Brunelle, and it’s on an album called [Witness, volume III: Towards the Future]
